cards.back: Transmission Control Protocol/Internet Protocol, a suite of communication protocols used to connect devices on the internet
Open Systems Interconnection Model, a 7-layer framework for understanding and designing computer networks
A widely used local area network (LAN) technology that uses carrier sense multiple access with collision detection (CSMA/CD) to transmit data
Internet Protocol address, a unique numerical label assigned to each device on a network for communication purposes
Hypertext Transfer Protocol, a protocol used for transferring data over the internet, including web pages and online resources
